visual_narrative: Opens with a calm Trinitat street hook. Each ranked item is preceded by Benimaclet/Trinidad cycling footage that builds energy — from slow establishing shots (#5, #4) through dynamic movement (#2, #1). Items escalate from a lonely chair (#5) through quirky plant (#4), vintage chest (#3), blue sofa (#2) to the winning mesa redonda (#1) with extended footage. Recap over Trinidad graffiti street, closing with a dramatic lens-cover gesture.
